x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: scriptdb command can be used to script database objects

options.name: --tables
options.description: include tables in the generated scripts [default: False]

options.name: --storeprocs
options.description: include stored procedures in the generated scripts [default: False]

options.name: --views
options.description: include views in the generated scripts [default: False]

options.name: --includeFunctions
options.description: include functions in the generated scripts [default: False]

options.name: --userdefineddatatypes
options.description: include user defined data types in the generated scripts [default: False]

options.name: --indexes
options.description: include indexes in the generated scripts [default: False]

options.name: --triggers
options.description: include triggers in the generated scripts [default: False]

options.name: --scriptsfolder
options.description: scripts output folder--folder will be cleared when generating the scripts
